commit_scope: Extend BML support from focused executable .bml files into companion-shaped .bml declaration files that parse through BML/BMF rules into class/interface components and run a source-originated Main method body through BMA.

local_validation.notes: New companion declaration proof passed across Go/Rust/TypeScript kernels with result 33554431. Existing real-file execution, thesis exit, inheritance, full class model, and primitive proof bands still pass. Full Form validation passed with 218 ok, 0 divergent.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A checked-in companion-shaped .bml file can be scanned from disk, parsed through BML/BMF declaration rules, converted into BML package/import/interface/class components, and run a source-originated Application.Main method body through native BMA execution.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-companion-file-proof.fk

phase_gate.reason: Focused companion declaration support is implemented locally and full Form validation passes; CI and production deployment proof are pending.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/tests/fixtures/bml-thesis-companion-declarations.bml is a real checked-in .bml source file using companion-shaped package/import/interface/class/section/property forms.
bml-source-scan-file now classifies BML properties such as public/private while preserving keywords such as class and Primitive.
bml-source-file-parse-declarations parses scanned source objects through BML/BMF declaration rules.
bml-source-declaration-model builds the BML class/interface model from source-originated components.

bml-thesis-companion-file-proof.fk verifies package/import values, section property inheritance, string consts, structural/delegated bases, interface inheritance, Application.Main detection, and Main method BMA return value 7.
docs/system_audit/bml_thesis_feature_audit_20260601.md keeps the full companion source compiler gap explicit.
